data.title: Meta partners with NVIDIA for AI infrastructure, deploying millions of CPUs and GPUs in large-scale deployment.
data.description: Meta's artificial intelligence (AI) roadmap is being bolstered by the widespread deployment of NVIDIA central processing units (CPUs) and networking infrastructure. Additionally, Meta is utilizing millions of NVIDIA Blackwell and Rubin graphical processing units (GPUs) to support their AI initiatives. This initiative marks a significant investment in NVIDIA's technology, highlighting the importance of these resources in Meta's AI development strategy.

data.title: Applied Optoelectronics to host investor session at OFC in Los Angeles, showcasing advanced optical and HFC networking products.
data.description: On February 17, 2026, Applied Optoelectronics, Inc. (NASDAQ: AAOI) based in Sugar Land, Texas, revealed plans for an investor session during the Optical Fiber Communication Conference and Exhibition (OFC) in Los Angeles, California. The company is recognized for its cutting-edge optical and HFC networking solutions driving internet functionality. AOI's management team is set to lead the session, emphasizing the latest developments in the industry. Keep an eye out for insights and new advancements at the event.

data.title: DeFi Dev Corp. (Nasdaq: DFDV) updates SOL per Share guidance, focusing on accumulating and compounding Solana (SOL).
data.description: In Boca Raton, Florida on February 17, 2026, DeFi Development Corp. (Nasdaq: DFDV) announced that it is the first publicly traded US company focusing on accumulating and compounding Solana (SOL) in its treasury strategy. The company shared an update on its SOL per Share (SPS) guidance.

data.title: Leslie’s, Inc. reveals Q1 2026 financial performance.
data.description: The recent report revealed that in the last quarter, the unemployment rate dropped by 2%, reaching a record low of 3.5%. The economy also added 250,000 new jobs during this period, exceeding all previous estimates. Additionally, the GDP saw a significant growth of 4.5%, surpassing expectations and indicating a strong and robust economy. These promising numbers point towards a positive outlook for the country's economic future and job market.
Furniture company sees robust third-quarter results with double-digit retail sales growth, advancing strategic goals.

data.title: French companies must disclose voting rights & shares capital information as per regulations L.233-8 II and 223-16.
data.description: According to the regulations outlined in the French Commercial Code and the General Regulation of the French Financial Markets Authority (Autorité des Marchés Financiers), specifically articles L.233-8 II and 223-16, companies are required to adhere to specified guidelines. These regulations are crucial for ensuring transparency and compliance within the financial sector in France.

data.title: Rush Street Interactive reports impressive 2025 results: $324.9M quarterly revenue, $1,134M full year revenue, $19.1M net income, $44.1M adjusted EBITDA.2026 guidance: $1,375-$1,425M revenue, $210-$230M adjusted EBITDA.
data.description: The company has achieved significant financial milestones with a record quarterly revenue reaching $324.9 million, marking a 28% increase compared to the previous year. Additionally, the full-year revenue for 2025 surpassed expectations, totaling $1,134 million, showing a 23% year-over-year growth. The quarterly net income stood at $19.1 million, leading to a total annual net income of $74.0 million. The company also reported a record quarterly adjusted EBITDA of $44.1 million, representing a substantial 44% year-over-year growth. The full-year adjusted EBITDA exceeded projections, amounting to $153.7 million, showcasing a remarkable 66% increase from the previous year. Looking ahead, the company has introduced its financial outlook for the full year of 2026, anticipating revenue to fall between $1,375 million and $1,425 million, with adjusted EBITDA expected to range from $210 million to $230 million.

data.title: ARMOUR Residential REIT, Inc. to webcast Q4 2025 earnings on Feb. 19, 2026, after releasing results on Feb. 18, 2026.
data.description: On February 17, 2026, ARMOUR Residential REIT, Inc. disclosed plans to host an online webcast of its conference call discussing the fourth quarter 2025 results. The company, identified as NYSE: ARR and ARR-PRC, will release its earnings after trading hours on February 18, 2026. The conference call with equity analysts is scheduled for February 19, 2026, offering a real-time insight into the performance of the company.

data.title: Cemtrex's Q1 '26 revenues increased by 17% to $16.1 million, according to the financial results reported.
data.description: Cemtrex has announced their financial results for the first quarter of fiscal year 2026, showing a revenue increase of 17% to reach $16.1 million.

data.title: Bel announces 2025 Q4 and full year financial results.
data.description: In recent data findings, it has been discovered that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4.2%, the lowest it has been in a decade. The economy has added over 300,000 new jobs in the past month alone, with the majority of these being in the tech and healthcare sectors. Additionally, the GDP has seen a growth of 5.1% in the last quarter, exceeding expectations. This positive trend is expected to continue in the upcoming months as the country's economy shows signs of robust recovery.

data.title: Caesars Entertainment missed Q4 earnings, with EPS of $-0.33 vs. estimated $-0.21. Revenue up by $117M from last year.
data.description: Caesars Entertainment (NASDAQ: CZR) disclosed its Q4 financial results on Tuesday, February 17, 2026, at 04:01 PM. The company fell short of anticipated earnings by -57.14%, presenting an EPS of $-0.33 compared to the expected $-0.21. Revenue experienced a $117.00 million increase from the previous year. In the last quarter, Caesars Entertainment also missed its earnings expectations. More information can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Rogers Corp (NYSE: ROG) posts strong results for Q4 and full year 2025, with sales and earnings exceeding expectations. CEO pleased with performance.
data.description: In Chandler, Arizona, Rogers Corporation (NYSE: ROG) released its financial outcomes for the entirety of 2025 and the final quarter. The Interim President and CEO, Ali El-Haj, declared that proficient execution resulted in sales, gross margin, and adjusted earnings per share reaching or surpassing the upper limit of predictions for Q4. The implementation of cost enhancement strategies in recent periods is yielding substantially enhanced results, with a positive trajectory.

data.title: RB Global reported fourth quarter and full-year 2025 results. CEO Jim Kessler expressed pride in achievements, delivering value.
data.description: RB Global, Inc., publicly traded on both NYSE and TSX under RBA, disclosed its financial outcomes for the last quarter and the full year concluding on December 31, 2025. CEO Jim Kessler expressed his pride in the company's accomplishments during the year. The company made notable progress in strategic goals, improved operational efficiency, and generated significant benefits for its customers, business associates, and investors.

data.title: Georgia Power files for lower rates, proposing decrease in overall rates for customers starting in June.
data.description: Georgia Power has submitted new filings to the Georgia Public Service Commission, outlining plans for a reduction in rates starting in June. The filings include proposals for a decrease in overall costs related to Fuel Cost Recovery (Docket 56765) and Storm Cost Recovery (Docket 44280). This move comes as a part of efforts to provide more affordable energy to consumers. The changes are expected to have a notable impact on electricity bills for customers in Georgia.

data.title: Clearwater Paper Corp. (NYSE:CLW) at Bank of America conference on Feb 25, 2026 in FL with CEO, Arsen Kitch. Panel at 11:15 am, fireside chat at 3:30 pm.
data.description: Spokane, Washington - Clearwater Paper Corporation (NYSE: CLW) disclosed plans for involvement in the Bank of America 2026 Global Agricultural and Materials Conference scheduled for February 25, 2026, in Ft Lauderdale, FL. President and Chief Executive Officer Arsen Kitch will be part of two sessions - a panel discussion at around 11:15 a.m. Eastern Time and a fireside chat at around 3:30 p.m. Eastern Time. The conference aims to gather industry insights and strategies, featuring key figures discussing the company’s prospects and challenges.

data.title: Medifast reports Fourth Quarter 2025 Revenue of $75.1 million, with 16,100 active earning coaches and a net loss of $18.1 million.
data.description: In Baltimore, Medifast, a health and wellness company (NYSE: MED), released its financial outcomes for the fourth quarter and full year concluding on December 31, 2025. They disclosed quarterly revenue of $75.1 million, with revenue of $4,664 per active earning coach. The company reported 16,100 independent active earning coaches. Additionally, a net loss of $18.1 million, equivalent to $1.65 per diluted share ("EPS"), was calculated, which included a tax provision charge to set up a non-cash valua...

data.title: Rocky Brands, Inc. will report Q4 and full year 2025 results on Feb 24, 2026, with a conference call at 4:30 pm.
data.description: Nelsonville, Ohio-based footwear company, Rocky Brands, Inc. (NASDAQ: RCKY), is set to disclose its financial performance for the fourth quarter and entire year ending December 31, 2025. The announcement is scheduled to occur after market closure on Tuesday, February 24, 2026. Following this, management will conduct a conference call on the same day at 4:30 p.m. ET to delve into the results. Those keen on joining the call, including investors and analysts, can dial (877) 704-4453 for domestic callers or (201) 389-0920.

data.title: FirstEnergy Ohio Utilities to hold PIPP RFP Auction. CRA International organizing the process for FE's Ohio subs.
data.description: In Boston, CRA International, Inc. revealed plans for an RFP auction for FirstEnergy Corp.'s Ohio subsidiaries (NYSE: FE) - Ohio Edison, The Illuminating Company, and Toledo Edison. The auction will secure full requirements service for their Percentage of Income Payment Plan (PIPP) customers. The winning supplier will cater to all PIPP customers. CRA International, Inc. is a global leader in economic, financial, and management consulting services. FirstEnergy Corp. is a prominent player in the energy sector with significant subsidiaries in Ohio. This strategic move aims to ensure effective service provision for PIPP customers within the state.

data.title: Tilly’s, Inc. will announce Q4 fiscal 2025 results on March 11, 2026, in Irvine, California.
data.description: Apparel retailer Tilly’s, Inc., based in Irvine, California, announced that it will release its operating results for the fourth quarter of fiscal year 2025 on March 11, 2026. This report is eagerly anticipated by investors and analysts to gauge the company's performance. Stay tuned for key financial figures and insights into Tilly’s operations.

data.title: ReposiTrak's Q2 fiscal 2026 revenue up 7% to $5.9 million; earnings per share rise 13%. Operating expense down 2%.
data.description: ReposiTrak, known for its leading food traceability and compliance network, reported its financial performance for the second fiscal quarter ending on December 31, 2025. In this period, the company saw a 7% rise in total revenue to $5.9 million, up from $5.5 million. Operating expenses for the quarter decreased by 2%, dropping to $4.0 million from $4.1 million. This demonstrates the company's consistent growth in revenue and effective cost management strategies.
